cards.title: Rebel Kayaks
cards.subtitle: Kayak community & future shop. Articles, events, e-commerce, kayak designer — all built on Idun. The site that started it all.

cards.title: Your site?
cards.subtitle: We’re looking for early adopters who want a fast, clean website without the usual CMS headaches. Get in touch.

settings.content:
What you get out of the box

Every Idun site comes with these capabilities. Toggle on what you need.

FeatureWhat it does
Pages & BlogVisual editor with modules — hero, cards, galleries, CTAs. No code needed.
Contact FormsBuild forms in the admin. Submissions, confirmations, email notifications.
E-commerceProducts, categories, cart, checkout. Stripe payments.
Online CoursesCreate and sell courses. Video, text, certificates.
Email CampaignsCompose, template, send, and track. Built right in.
Multi-languageTranslate any page. DeepL integration for auto-translation.
AI AssistantHugin helps you write, edit, and manage content.
AnalyticsPrivacy-respecting Umami analytics. No cookie banners needed.
User ManagementRoles, permissions, invitations, GDPR compliance. All built in.

settings.title: Want your site on this page?
settings.description: We’d love to build it for you. Early adopters get our best attention.
